allow: Bash(python main.py "Build a TypeScript React frontend for a Todo List app. The backend is a FastAPI server running at http://127.0.0.1:8000 with these endpoints: GET /todos \(list all\), POST /todos \(create, body: {title: string, description?: string}\), GET /todos/{id}, PUT /todos/{id} \(body: {title?, description?, completed?}\), DELETE /todos/{id}. Requirements: use Vite + React + TypeScript, fetch API for HTTP calls \(no axios\), display todos in a list with title and description, checkbox to toggle completed, delete button per todo, form to add new todo \(title + description\), show loading and error states. Output all files needed to run with: npm create vite, including package.json, src/App.tsx, src/types.ts, src/api.ts, index.html. No external UI libraries, plain CSS in App.css.")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/run -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Origin: http://localhost:5173' -d '{"prompt": "build a hello world app"}' --max-time 5)
